creator: nobutaka@nobutaka.com
text:
Update graphics/gimp1-i18n port to 1.1.8.

Added files: gimp1-i18n/patches/patch-be, patch-bf, patch-bg, patch-bh,
                                patch-bi, patch-bj, patch-bk, patch-bl,
                                patch-bm

Removed files: gimp1-i18n/patches/patch-ab, patch-af, patch-ar, patch-as,
                                  patch-at, patch-au, patch-av, patch-aw,
                                  patch-ax, patch-ay, patch-az, patch-ba,
                                  patch-bb

Fix: Please apply this patch.
